title: [Feature]: Add progress update when downloading/installing container image
body:
### Feature request description

The attached video shows the installation process of Podman via [KeenWrite](https://github.com/DaveJarvis/keenwrite). There are certain points where Podman gives no indication of progress:

* During "Extracting compressed file"
* During "Importing operating system into WSL"
* During "Copying blob ..." when pulling down a large image (longest wait of all)

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/2131950/210449733-d45ba3d4-2eb4-47b8-bcde-2b30b15c70f5.mp4


### Suggest potential solution

Perhaps any operation more than three seconds (on average hardware) could use a progress indicator?


### Have you considered any alternatives?

None, progress information needs to be written to standard output.

### Additional context

The full video shows the software converting Podman's README file into a PDF file.

[![KeenWrite - Podman](http://i2.ytimg.com/vi/0HV9ClKPZKU/0.jpg)](https://youtu.be/0HV9ClKPZKU)

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

I've added a tutorial that shows the installation with more context:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8dCui_hHK6U&list=PLB-WIt1cZYLm1MMx2FBG9KWzPIoWZMKu_&index=1
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
